overall.description: A stationary cinematic shot from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy neon-lit city street at night. A yellow sports car stops abruptly in the road causing a traffic obstruction, then drives off as a green muscle car passes by, with futuristic vehicles navigating the wet asphalt throughout.

segments.scene_description: A bright yellow sports car stops abruptly in the middle of the wet road, creating a traffic obstruction. The vehicle remains stationary with its headlights illuminating the rain, while other cars navigate around it. The neon-lit buildings continue to glow in the background as the rain falls steadily.

segments.scene_description: The yellow sports car finally accelerates and drives off to the right, clearing the obstruction. Shortly after, a metallic green muscle car with glowing undercarriage lights drives past the camera from the distance. Traffic resumes normal flow on the rain-soaked cyberpunk street as the scene concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a rainy cyberpunk street at night as a momentary traffic obstruction gives way to a restored flow of futuristic vehicles. It begins with a white delivery van passing through a hazy atmosphere, where neon billboards cast vibrant reflections across the wet asphalt. As the camera remains stationary, a bright yellow sports car abruptly stops in the middle of the road, its headlights cutting through the steady rain and forcing other cars to navigate around it. The scene then shifts as the yellow car accelerates and clears the path, allowing a metallic green muscle car with glowing undercarriage lights to surge past from the distance. Finally, the traffic resumes its normal rhythm under the glow of the artificial city lights as the rain continues to fall.
